note: Model REGISTRY (data, drop-in extensible) — L1 amendment, token-economics-levers-2026-07-02. One entry per model: adding a model/version = one entry here + a calibration report (hone calibrate), nothing else. Pricing per 1M tokens, standard API tier. tier_rank is the capability rank the judge constraint compares (judge tier_rank >= maker, different lineage). quota_pool names the subscription pool the owner's real currency draws from. calibration: null = INELIGIBLE for routing (fail-closed) until `hone calibrate --model <name>` produces a report; initial entries are grandfathered on digitized external evals.
